About The Company

Your trusted partner for drydocking excellence

SAFEEN Drydocks is part of Noatum Maritime, established in 2023 as a joint venture between AD Ports Group (51%) and Premier Marine Eng. Services (49%). We are strategically located at Khalifa Port and Mina Zayed Port, Abu Dhabi, and at Balenciaga Shipyard, Zumaia, Spain.

Our team of highly skilled professionals works closely with clients to deliver tailored drydocking, newbuilding, repair, and marine engineering solutions — driving efficient, innovative outcomes with the highest safety standards.

Our seamless project management approach ensures timely execution without compromising on quality, making us the trusted choice for ship repair and marine operations in the region.

Dependable, time-tested capabilities

Driven by proven expertise and precision

Since its inception, SAFEEN Drydocks has established itself as a leading provider of ship repair, drydocking, and marine engineering services in the region.

We leverage our extensive experience, combined with our commitment to innovative technology and rigorous safety standards, to ensure successful project completion even in the most demanding environments.

Our floating dock infrastructure at Khalifa Port and Mina Zayed Port handles vessels up to 230 m LOA with a lifting capacity of 21,000 tonnes — one of the largest floating dock capacities in the region.

View Facilities  ›

Our Facilities

World-class infrastructure across UAE & Spain

Three floating docks, 1,000 metres of quayside, and fully equipped fabrication workshops — integrated across Khalifa Port, Mina Zayed Port, and Balenciaga Shipyard in Zumaia, Spain.

Our facilities are designed to accommodate diverse vessel types and sizes, from offshore support vessels and tankers to rigs and specialised newbuild projects.

Khalifa Port
FD1 · 120m · 5,000T lift
Mina Zayed Port
FD2 · 230m · 21,000T lift
Mina Zayed Port
FD3 · 142m · 18,000T lift
Balenciaga, Spain
2 berths · 105m max LOA

Balenciaga Shipyard, Zumaia

Our historic European facility in the Basque Country of Spain brings over 120 years of shipbuilding heritage, with two building berths, an outfitting quay, and a 3,530 m² cutting and manufacturing facility.

Our Services

Complete marine engineering solutions

SAFEEN Drydocks delivers data-driven, precision-engineered ship repair, newbuilding, and afloat maintenance. Our commitment to safety and efficiency translates to reduced downtime, extended asset life, and maximised return on investment.

Core Service 01

Drydocking

Comprehensive maintenance and repair services using floating dock infrastructure for all vessel classes.

  • Hull cleaning & anti-fouling coating
  • Propulsion system overhaul
  • Class renewal drydockings
  • Structural surveys & steel repairs
Core Service 02

Afloat / Anchorage Repair

Maintenance performed at the quay wall to minimise vessel downtime and improve turnaround efficiency.

  • Running repairs at berth
  • 1,000 m quayside capacity
  • Dual-port UAE access
Core Service 03

New Building

Design and construction of specialised vessels — AHTS, desalination barges, ConRo, and Ro-Ro vessels.

  • Rawabi 73 & 77 AHTS vessels
  • 50,000 m³/day desal barges
  • ConRo — 1,920 vehicles & 100 containers
Core Service 04

Conversion & Retrofit

Major vessel modifications and asset life extension programmes tailored to client requirements.

  • Cargo configuration changes
  • Asset life extension projects
  • Regulatory compliance upgrades
Core Service 05

Rig Repairs

Specialised hub for offshore rig services — serving the UAE's active oil & gas marine sector.

  • Offshore rig maintenance
  • Structural & mechanical repairs
  • Safety systems inspection
Workshop Services

Engineering Workshops

Full in-house capability — CNC fabrication, mechanical, electrical, interiors, HVAC, and heavy lift.

  • CNC cutting & certified welding
  • Main/auxiliary engine overhaul
  • Electrical & automation systems
  • Interiors, carpentry & HVAC

Flagship Projects

Proven track record of delivery

Over 370 vessels built, 27 ERRVs for North Star Shipping, and major ongoing programmes across Abu Dhabi, the North Sea, and the Basque Country.

AHTS · 2023

Rawabi 73 & 77

Anchor Handling Tug Supply Vessels

120T BP anchor handlers delivered for Rawabi in Saudi Arabia, showcasing SAFEEN Drydocks' complex vessel construction capabilities through the PMES JV.

Newbuild · Active

Desalination Barges

Reverse Osmosis · 50,000 m³/day

Two barges each delivering approximately 50,000 m³/day of fresh water using reverse osmosis technology — currently in final commissioning stage in Abu Dhabi.

SOV · 2022 / 2024

Edda Brint & Edda Goelo

Service Operation Vessels — Offshore Wind

Two cutting-edge Service Operation Vessels for the offshore wind sector, demonstrating capability in next-generation sustainable energy support vessel construction.

Cargo · 2016 / 2017

Telmo & Deun

99.9 m Multi-Purpose Cargo Vessels

Two 99.9 m multi-purpose cargo vessels delivered on schedule, showcasing the shipyard's structural fabrication, outfitting, and delivery excellence.

ERRV · 2003–2016

Grampian Series

27 Emergency Response & Rescue Vessels

27 ERRVs delivered for North Star Shipping over a sustained 13-year programme — one of the most significant long-term newbuilding programmes in the yard's history.

ConRo · Active

ConRo Project

Container & Ro-Ro — 143 m LOA

Design and build of a specialised ConRo vessel carrying 1,920 vehicles and 100 containers — expanding SAFEEN Drydocks into the combined carrier segment.
